compiled_state.title: check-plugin-boundary.sh: allowlist comment says 'same directory as script' -> code reads from REPO_ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Fix: updated comment on line 8 of check-plugin-boundary.sh from 'same directory as this script' to '$REPO_ROOT/.claude/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf (or override via PLUGIN_BOUNDARY_ALLOWLIST env var)'. Comment now matches code on line 24.
comments.author: Test
